---
name: Partnership / Pilot Inquiry
about: Form for government agencies, MSME boards, and investors to request pilots or query integrations.
title: "[PARTNERSHIP] "
labels: partnership, pilot
assignees: ''
---

### Organization Name
Name of the public department, MSME board, or investment fund.

### Organization Type
- [ ] State Government Department (e.g., Agriculture)
- [ ] Central Government Agency
- [ ] MSME Facilitation Council
- [ ] Private Venture / Seed Fund
- [ ] Non-Governmental Organization (NGO)
- [ ] Other

### Target Application
Which application in the suite are you interested in piloting?
- [ ] Kisan Voice AI (IVR integration)
- [ ] VaadVivaad (Mediation filing portal)
- [ ] DocPatram (Panchayat document automation)
- [ ] Custom integration of another AIKosh dataset

### Scale of Deployment
Please specify expected volumes (e.g., estimated weekly calls, dispute volume, or document counts).

### Data Residency Requirements
- [ ] SaaS Deployment (NIC / MEITY empanelled host)
- [ ] State Data Center (SDC) On-Premise Installation
- [ ] Standard Cloud host

### Contact Details
Provide name, designation, and work email address.
